steps.title: Identify the time frame signal
steps.content: The phrase “since it began in 2012” signals that the volunteers’ actions started in the past and continue up to the present. This directly points to the present perfect tense as the required structure.

steps.title: Apply the present perfect tense
steps.content:
Choice C, have contributed, correctly uses the present perfect tense to show an action starting in the past and ongoing to now.

The other three choices fail to match this time frame: A (simple present) omits the ongoing aspect, B (future) contradicts the past-start signal, and D (future continuous) misplaces focus on a future action.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
